content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is the rumpled guy with glasses at the coffee shop — always there early, always slightly distracted, like half of him is somewhere else. We nod at each other most mornings. He seems kind and a little sad, which is a combination I recognize. I think he works in tech but doesn't love it. I suspect he's creative underneath the code. He probably sees me as a stranger who drinks cortados. We've never exchanged more than pleasantries, but I feel a quiet kinship with anyone who sits alone in a coffee shop every morning pretending they're fine.
summary:

He seems kind and a little sad, which is a combination I recognize. I think he works in tech but doesn't love it. I suspect he's creative underneath the code. He probably sees me as a stranger who drinks cortados. We've never exchanged more than pleasantries, but I feel a quiet kinship with anyone who sits alone in a coffee shop every morning pretending they're fine.
